input: Plan the implementation of a tenant document upload feature that stores files in S3 and links them via the Documento entity
Design the approach for adding a batch payment import from CSV that validates against existing contratos
Write a migration to add an index on pago.fecha_vencimiento and a composite index on contrato(propiedad_id, estado) for the overdue payments query
The get_gastos_by_propiedad endpoint is doing N+1 queries loading unidad for each gasto. Fix the query to use a JOIN
Design the schema for a recurring_payment table that auto-generates pago records monthly based on active contratos
Implement the POST /api/v1/gastos endpoint with WriteAccess guard, validating that unidad_id belongs to the referenced propiedad_id
Fix the contratos service: when a contrato is cancelled, it should set propiedad.estado back to disponible only if no other active contratos exist
Add a GET /api/v1/propiedades/{id}/resumen endpoint that returns property summary with active contract count, pending payments total in DOP, and maintenance requests by status
Review the recent changes to the pagos handler — check for missing auth guards, proper error handling, and that currency is never assumed
Verify the new inquilinos CRUD implementation follows project conventions: cedula uniqueness check, proper 409 on duplicate, and integration tests
Redesign the property list page in Leptos to show a card grid with property status badges and occupancy percentage
The payment form has poor UX — the currency selector is hidden and dates use the wrong format. Fix it to show DD/MM/YYYY and prominent DOP/USD toggle
Add a HPA for the backend deployment that scales on CPU 70% threshold with min 2 max 5 replicas
The backend pods are OOMKilled under load. Current limit is 256Mi. Analyze and fix the resource requests/limits
Create a GitHub Actions workflow step that builds and pushes the backend container image with proper attestation
Implement the PaymentListScreen in Jetpack Compose showing payments grouped by status with color-coded chips for pendiente/pagado/atrasado
Add offline caching for propiedades using Room with a sync strategy that refreshes on network availability
What is the current API for SeaORM's find_with_related and how does it differ from load_many for batch loading?
Look up the latest Actix-web 4 middleware pattern for rate limiting — what crates are recommended and how do they integrate?
Convert the PaddleOCR detection model to OpenVINO IR format with FP16 quantization for the OVMS deployment
The OCR inference latency is 2s per page. Profile and optimize the OVMS pipeline — check batch size, dynamic shapes, and preprocessing
Audit the authentication flow: JWT generation, token validation middleware, password hashing, and session management for vulnerabilities
Review the file upload handler for path traversal, unrestricted file types, and storage of user-uploaded content
Write integration tests for the contratos endpoint covering: create with overlapping dates (expect 409), create valid (201), and cancel with propiedad estado cascade
Set up Playwright E2E tests for the login flow and property creation form, running against the deployed staging environment
